mainEntity.name: Can employer fire me after ladder fall in West Jordan?
mainEntity.text: Can employer fire me after ladder fall in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: No retaliation protected under Utah law; file with Labor Commission if terminated post-injury.

suggestedAnswer.text: West Jordan: Prove causal link via timing/docs. Get unemployment + comp. 'Constructive discharge' if forced out. 15% cases face this.

name: Job Protection After Falls
description: No retaliation protected under Utah law; file with Labor Commission if terminated post-injury.
